description: Operator edits the AI's screening question from gender-based phrasing to relationship-based phrasing. The semantic ask is identical (group composition); only the framework changed. Expected classification: NO_FIX with editType=FRAMING_TONE.
agentMessageDraft: Could you let me know whether your group is both male, both female, or mixed?
operatorEdited: Could you let me know whether your group is family or friends?
